name: Cleric C4: Divine Support — Shield of Faith + Guiding Bolt + Healing Word (Multi-PC)
description: L5 Life Cleric (Sister Lyra) supports a Fighter (Sir Daven) against two enemies. Tests: Shield of Faith (L1 bonus action, concentration, +2 AC to ally), Guiding Bolt (L1 action spell attack, marks target for advantage), Healing Word (L1 bonus heal), Sacred Flame (cantrip, bonus-action compatible), Fighter Extra Attack, and multi-PC turn sequencing. NOTE: Two-spell rule prevents leveled bonus action spell on same turn as leveled action spell — Shield of Faith is paired with Sacred Flame (cantrip) in R1 to comply.

characters.comment: Cleric support caster: WIS 18, spellSaveDC 15, spellAttackBonus +7. Goes first (high initiative). Position (5,10) — back line.
characters.name: Sister Lyra

characters.comment: Fighter Champion L5: STR 18, Extra Attack (2 attacks per action), Action Surge. Position (10,10) — 5ft from Stone Ogre at (15,10), within melee reach.
characters.name: Sir Daven

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Make two attacks when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: Once per short rest, take an additional action on your turn.

monsters.comment: Stone Ogre: large humanoid, high HP, hard hitter. AC 11 — easy to hit, soaks damage. Primary target for Guiding Bolt + Sir Daven attacks.
monsters.name: Stone Ogre

monsters.comment: Bandit Warlord: tactical humanoid with Longsword. Secondary target. AC 15.
monsters.name: Bandit Warlord

actions.comment: === ROUND 1: Sister Lyra goes first. Shield of Faith (bonus, concentration) + Sacred Flame (cantrip action). Two-spell rule: leveled bonus action spell + cantrip action = ALLOWED. ===

input.text: I call upon divine power to shield my ally!

actions.comment: Lyra rolls 20 to guarantee going first.

R1 BONUS ACTION: Shield of Faith on Sir Daven. L1 concentration, +2 AC to ally for duration. Bonus action, so must use cantrip as action this turn. NOTE: Per GAP-2, buff spells (Shield of Faith) may not consume a spell slot — do NOT assert slot decrement.

input.text: cast Shield of Faith on Sir Daven

actions.comment: Verify concentration on Shield of Faith is active (L1 abjuration concentration).
R1 ACTION: Sacred Flame cantrip at Stone Ogre. After leveled bonus action spell, only a cantrip may be cast as the action. DEX save auto-resolved. 2d8 radiant at L5.

input.text: cast Sacred Flame at Stone Ogre

actions.comment: Sacred Flame consumes no spell slot (cantrip). Shield of Faith consumed 1 L1 slot (now confirmed working — GAP-2 resolved). Slots: 4 → 3.
Queue monsters R1. Both attack Sir Daven — he has Shield of Faith (+2 AC = AC 20).
Lyra ends R1. Monsters act, then Sir Daven's turn.
Wait for Sir Daven's R1 turn (monsters act between).
R1 Sir Daven attacks Stone Ogre with Longsword (Extra Attack = 2 attacks). AC 11 vs +7 → hits on 4+.

input.text: I attack the Stone Ogre with my Longsword

actions.comment: R1 Daven attack 1: 15 + 7 = 22 vs AC 11 → hit.
Damage roll: 7 (1d8+4 slashing). Extra Attack chains to attack 2/2.
Extra Attack 2/2: 12 + 7 = 19 vs AC 11 → hit.
Second attack damage: 9 (1d8+4 slashing). Attack sequence complete.
Sir Daven ends R1.
=== ROUND 2: Sister Lyra — Guiding Bolt (leveled action spell attack) + NO bonus action spell (two-spell rule). ===
Verify Lyra HP — monsters attacked Sir Daven in R1 (Shield of Faith AC 20 reduces hits). Lyra likely untouched.
Verify Sir Daven HP — may have taken some hits despite Shield of Faith (AC 20 vs Ogre +6 = hits on 14+).

R2 ACTION: Guiding Bolt at Stone Ogre. L1 spell attack: roll + 7 vs AC 11. On hit: 4d6 radiant damage + marks target (next attack has advantage). This is a leveled action spell — cannot cast leveled bonus action spell same turn.

input.text: cast Guiding Bolt at Stone Ogre

actions.comment: Attack roll: 12 + 7 = 19 vs AC 11 → hit.
Damage: 14 (4d6 radiant). Ogre already wounded — should drop significantly.
Verify L1 slot consumed by Guiding Bolt: 3 → 2. (Shield of Faith spent one slot in R1: 4→3. Guiding Bolt now: 3→2.)
TWO-SPELL RULE ENFORCEMENT: Attempt to cast Healing Word (leveled bonus action spell) after Guiding Bolt (leveled action spell). Must be BLOCKED.

input.text: cast Healing Word on Sir Daven

actions.comment: Queue monsters R2. Both attack Sir Daven.
Lyra ends R2.
Wait for Sir Daven R2.
R2 Sir Daven attacks Stone Ogre. Guiding Bolt marks Ogre — next attack has advantage. First attack should benefit.

input.text: I attack the Stone Ogre with my Longsword

actions.comment: Attack roll: 14 + 7 = 21 vs AC 11 → hit.
Damage: 8. Extra Attack chains to attack 2/2.
Extra Attack 2/2: 11 + 7 = 18 vs AC 11 → hit.
Second attack damage: 6. Attack sequence complete.
Sir Daven ends R2.
=== ROUND 3: Sister Lyra — Sacred Flame (cantrip) + Healing Word (bonus heal). Cantrip action + leveled bonus = ALLOWED. ===
R3 ACTION: Sacred Flame cantrip at Stone Ogre. Frees up bonus action for Healing Word.

input.text: cast Sacred Flame at Stone Ogre

actions.comment: R3 BONUS ACTION: Healing Word on Sir Daven. L1 bonus action ranged heal: 2d4+4 (WIS mod +4 at L5). Allowed because action was a cantrip (Sacred Flame).

input.text: cast Healing Word on Sir Daven

actions.comment: Verify L1 slot consumed by Healing Word: 2 → 1. (Shield of Faith R1: 4→3. Guiding Bolt R2: 3→2. Healing Word now: 2→1.)
Verify Sir Daven healed by Healing Word (2d4+4 = 6-12 HP gained). Broad range assertion.
Verify concentration: Shield of Faith should still be active (concentration spells are dropped on new concentration cast; we haven't cast another concentration spell).
Queue monsters R3.
Lyra ends R3.
Wait for Sir Daven R3.
R3 Sir Daven attacks Stone Ogre — Extra Attack (2 attacks).

input.text: I attack the Stone Ogre with my Longsword

actions.comment: R3 Sir Daven attack 1: 16 + 7 = 23 → hit.
Damage 1: 10. Extra Attack chains.
Attack 2 (Extra Attack chain): 13 + 7 = 20 → hit.
Damage 2: 8. Attack sequence R3 complete.
Sir Daven ends R3.
=== ROUND 4: Final round — assert key resource state ===
R4: Lyra casts Sacred Flame to finish off Ogre.

input.text: cast Sacred Flame at Stone Ogre

actions.comment: Final assertion: L1 slots at 1 (Shield of Faith R1: 4→3, Guiding Bolt R2: 3→2, Healing Word R3: 2→1).
Final assertion: Sir Daven's actionSurge still available (never used).
Final assertion: combat still active (high HP enemies).
